channel.title: yocto on Dr Jas Powell
channel.description: Recent content in yocto on Dr Jas Powell

item.title: 💻 Yocto Linux build for Raspberry Pi 4 🍓 🥧 👩‍💻
item.description: Let’s build our own Linux operating system for a Raspberry Pi 4 First we need a big build box, something 16 VPC and 32GB RAM from AWS should do the trick. I like this machine: c4.4xlarge Set up the development environment sudo apt update && sudo apt -qy dist-upgrade && sudo apt -qy install gawk wget git diffstat unzip texinfo gcc-multilib build-essential chrpath socat libsdl1.2-dev xterm sed cvs subversion coreutils texi2html docbook-utils python-pysqlite2 help2man desktop-file-utils libgl1-mesa-dev libglu1-mesa-dev mercurial autoconf automake groff curl lzop asciidoc u-boot-tools cpio sudo rsync linux-headers-$(uname -r) locales Additional requirements:
